prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约11196→12411→17126→12430→16561，整体波动较大，2023年因省控线大幅下降（理科一批从515降至485）导致位次骤降至17126，2024年反弹至12430，2025年又后移至16561，近两年呈后移趋势，2025年基准约16561名；本省理科计划2021–2025年分别为56→57→56→58→62人，呈小幅增长趋势；2026年计划69人，较2025年增加7人（+11.3%），扩招幅度明显，招生名额增加使竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第83名，近年排名稳定在74–85名区间，属于中上水平211院校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风相关舆情；2024年声誉偏负面（陕西文科招生分数线骤降）；抖音热度总排名第51位（较热），2023年曾排第10位（高热），短视频曝光度尚可，但近年负面舆情对报考心理有一定抑制；风景园林学A+（全国顶尖），是该校唯一A类学科，与农林特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力；但整体A类学科数量较少。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校招生专业匹配度一般（该校以农林、环境、生物类为主）；生化环材类持续劝退，该校相关专业较多可能影响整体报考热度；本省2026年考生总数约37.79万人，较2025年（28.57万人）大幅增加约32.3%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约22.9万人，竞争显著加剧；该校位于北京，对西南地区考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16561名、2026年扩招11.3%以及本省考生大幅增加约32.3%导致竞争加剧，在扩招与考生激增的双重作用下，考生增幅远超扩招幅度，预计位次进一步后移；预测最低位次约17883名，区间17383–18383名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 11196 → 12411 → 17126 → 12430 → 16561, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to a sharp drop in the provincial control line (science first batch from 515 to 485), the ranking plummeted to 17126, rebounded to 12430 in 2024, and then shifted back to 16561 in 2025, with a backward trend in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is about 16561. The provincial science enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 56 → 57 → 56 → 58 → 62, showing a slight increase. The 2026 plan is 69, an increase of 7 (+11.3%) compared to 2025, with a clear expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 74–85 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 institutions. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics and style public opinion; in 2024, reputation was negative (Shaanxi liberal arts admission分数线 dropped sharply). Douyin heat total ranking 51st (relatively hot), once ranked 10th in 2023 (very hot), short video exposure is acceptable, but recent negative public opinion has somewhat suppressed application psychology. Landscape Architecture is A+ (top in the country), the only A-class discipline of the university, highly consistent with the forestry and agriculture characteristics, strongly attracting related majors; but overall, the number of A-class disciplines is small.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, with average match to the university's enrollment majors (mainly forestry, environment, biology). Chemistry, Biology, Materials, Environment majors are continuously discouraged, and the university's many related majors may affect overall application heat. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (285,700). By historical proportion, physics category examinees are estimated at about 229,000, significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has some regional attraction for candidates from the southwest.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 16561, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 11.3%, and the sharp increase of about 32.3% in provincial examinees leading to intensified competition, under the dual effects of expansion and surge in examinees, the growth in examinees far exceeds the expansion rate, and the ranking is expected to shift further back. The predicted lowest ranking is about 17883, with a range of 17383–18383.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 17383–18383, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Landscape Architecture, Landscape Gardening and other flagship majors can be sprinted). For Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc.), the ranking must be significantly better than the upper limit of the range to attempt. Tier 3 majors serve as safety choices. The university has distinct forestry and agriculture characteristics, with Landscape Architecture A+ being top in the country, which candidates interested in related fields can consider.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 2454 → 2148 → 3311 → 2352 → 2496, fluctuating within the 2100–3300 range. In 2023, due to a significant drop in the provincial control line (liberal arts first batch from 575 to 530), the ranking sharply fell to 3311, rebounded to 2352 in 2024, and slightly shifted to 2496 in 2025. Over the past three years, the fluctuation range is about 1000 places, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 2496. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 10 → 9 → 9 → 10 → 10, basically stable at 9–10. The 2026 plan is 10, unchanged from 2025, with no change in enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (related to teacher ethics and style public opinion); the 2024 reputation is slightly negative (sharp drop in liberal arts admission scores in Shaanxi). Douyin popularity ranks 51st overall (relatively hot), with overall exposure slightly above average. Landscape Architecture is A+ (top in the country), which has no direct disciplinary connection with liberal arts admission majors (Law, English, Business Administration, International Economics and Trade), but enhances the overall brand of the school.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has divided social popularity and is wait-and-see; English/foreign languages are generally wait-and-see; Business Administration is clearly discouraged; International Economics and Trade, as a finance and economics category, has divided popularity and is wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (285,700). Estimated history category examinees are about 148,700 based on historical proportions, with significantly intensified competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has a certain regional appeal to candidates from the southwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2496, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and the significant increase of about 32.3% in provincial examinees leading to intensified competition, with the plan unchanged and examinees surging, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2526, with a range of 2026–3026.

- International Economics and Trade.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are few liberal arts admission majors (only Law, International Economics and Trade, English, and Business Administration, 4 directions). If the ranking is within the predicted range of 2026–3026, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 English and Business Administration as main targets. For Tier 1 Law (Outstanding Legal Talent Experimental Class), the ranking must be significantly better than the upper limit of the range to be a sprint option. The liberal arts majors of this university have a weak connection with the school's forestry and agriculture characteristics. When applying, candidates should comprehensively consider personal interests and employment prospects.
